video.title: Cyclist Sam Bennett wins the Paris-Nice Stage 3

all_candidates.title: Cyclist Sam Bennett wins the Paris-Nice Stage 3

transcript.clean_text: 12 seconds the time is just slipping away but the kilometers aren't slipping away fast enough the demoralizing look across the shoulder as he can see the pelaton breathing down his neck and a little pat on the backside to Pierre lur for some more encouragement lur fully committed at the tip of the saddle they cannot afford for a split second to play the game of cat and mouse Riders peeling off from the front having done the job Dean C now is left to fend for himself Roman combo he tries once more Pierre lur for the slipstream but now it will be the day of the sprinters the little rise across the bridge and then it's down to the Finish Line this will be a quick finish 1 kilm remaining 1,000 M short for combo and lur heartbreak for the Breakaway opportunity for the sprinters Jack Bal with a big kiwi at the front Marcel K sitting in third position Dean Co the lone Rider from the Trex sea Fredo team as his National Champion Andre GLE moves forward to fight Sunny Co Bradley just as we saw yesterday the man in the green jersey no teammates but he is forcing his way into somebody's slipstream he's spending a lot of energy though in the process the yellow Jersey he rubs the shoulders of Brian Cocker now the Sprint starts to open up or not quite they're still waiting Fabio satini at the front he swings off is it too early for Marcel kle kle Bennett is challenging Kristoff is coming through de Co is still a factor but it's Bennett who takes the victory Sam Bennett collects the win against the world's best he was one of the outside favorites but he comes home to go to the top step of the podium and look at the names behind him Dean gold Kristoff kentle Matthews add to the mix to Mar and GLE that is a world class win by Sam Bennetts and you could not find a more fitting winner he hails from caral Shaw the home of Mr Perry sha Kelly sha Kelly is here at the race as well and Sam Bennett the early part of his career was with sha Kelly's development team and now he bursts through for the biggest win of his career
